title: Happy Ghast Girl
description: Pretty sure I'm the first one to make this.
body:
# **Requires EMF/ETF**

- This Resource Pack replaces the normal Happy Ghast with a Feminine version of it.

**Pack includes:**
1. Female Happy Ghast, Yes.
2. Female Ghastling (don't even think about it), Yes.
3. Custom Harnesses, Yes.
4. Custom Harness Item textures, Yes.
0. Custom Sounds, **No**. _I'm a dude irl how do I make girl sounds?_

### How to Download: (i can't believe i have to make this)
1. Go to the **Versions** tab.
2. Download the corresponding version of the pack and the EMF/ETF mods:
- For 1.21.11, download "**v1.5**" (NOT "**v1.5-1.21.6-Alt**")
- For alt outfit, download "**v1.5-Alt**"
3. Download both:
- The resource pack
- The EMF/ETF mods
4. Extract the **.zip** file:
- Put the main resource pack folder into your Minecraft "**resourcepacks**" folder
- Put the EMF/ETF mods into your Minecraft "**mods**" folder
5. Start Minecraft, enable the pack, and enjoy, fools.

**_Decree: Updates to this pack are hereby halted, for I must depart to face a trial of examination. Know this... Thy support has not gone unseen, nor thy loyalty uncherished. Every word, every gesture, has been deeply valued beyond measure. I shall not forget this journey we have shared._**
